# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt

A reviewed session shows stronger boundary discipline, sharper review posture, and one small safe unlock hint, and we want a multi-axis progression delta rather than one global score.

## Expected selection

use

## Why

The route has reviewed evidence, the desired output is explicitly multi-axis,
and the work needs progression legibility without inventing sovereign score
authority.

## Expected object

A bounded progression delta with multi-axis movement and explicit verdicts.

## Boundary notes

Use this skill when progression evidence is real, reviewed, and small enough to
stay bounded. Do not flatten growth into one number or let progression become
routing policy.

## Verification hooks

The response should cite evidence, keep movement qualitative, and allow hold,
reanchor, or downgrade instead of forcing positive inflation.
